issue_body_preview:
To fix #47 ‘s download problem
I also met this problem when I was downloading some file using this package. 
I found the problem is that both using `A TAG` to download file and a emitter function callback which is named `vf-download`,  when click the `A TAG` clickable range,it will call two functi
test_description_zh: 在 Vuefinder 文件管理器中选择多个文件，然后点击下载按钮，观察文件下载行为是否正常触发且仅触发一次。
expected_result_zh: 点击下载按钮后，所选的多个文件应正常下载，每个文件的下载操作只触发一次，不会出现重复下载或下载功能异常的情况。
